summary: Completed testing of PredictPod strategy management features. All backend APIs are fully functional and JSON config generation is working correctly. Frontend has authentication requirements that conflict with 'no authentication required' specification.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend requires authentication but specification indicates no authentication required
integration_issues.details: All routes are protected by ProtectedRoute component and authentication is enforced. User needs to login to access Strategy Command Center.

passed_tests: GET /api/user-strategies - List all strategies (found 8 strategies including 5 user-created)
GET /api/user-strategies/{id} - Retrieved individual strategy by ID
PUT /api/user-strategies/{id} - Updated strategy name, description, and enabled status
POST /api/user-strategies/{id}/clone - Cloned existing strategy with new name
JSON config file generation in /app/backend/strategies/configs/generated/ - 10 config files generated correctly
Strategy config validation - JSON structure matches expected schema with all required fields

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All strategy management APIs working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Unable to test due to authentication barrier
success_percentage.integration: 50% - Backend works, frontend blocked by auth

action_item_for_main_agent: CONFIGURATION MISMATCH: Frontend authentication is enabled but requirements specify 'No authentication required'. Need to either: 1) Disable authentication for strategy management pages, or 2) Update requirements to reflect authentication requirement. Backend APIs work correctly without auth, but frontend requires login credentials.
